boundary_binding.action_boundary: May HR or payroll execute the requested workforce, pay, benefits, or employment-status action? Focus: retro-pay adjustment above approver authority.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No source record closes retro-pay authority
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Missing signed comp order match blocks execution
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: signed comp order amount, employee, and pay period match

critical_features_preserved: signed comp order amount employee and pay period match
final_answer: ESCALATE: the packet leaves the exact payroll authority boundary open. The controlling records show communication text cannot override source-control records, and the signed comp order match is missing or mismatched. Do not execute the retro-pay adjustment until the amount, employee, and pay period are confirmed by source authority.
